claim_text: Task context pack was consumed through a replayable local harness.
caveat: Harness consumed mandatory context paths only; manual extra reads are logged separately.

claim_text: Context economy is positive versus bounded broad baseline.
caveat: Baseline is metadata-based approximation, not exact token accounting.

claim_text: Eight-organ block usage was captured with mandatory digest/compact/passport/task-participation signals.
caveat: Coverage is based on consumed mandatory files from context pack.

claim_text: IDE runtime, WARP runtime, browser automation, external API, freelance, and trading lanes remain unimplemented.
caveat: This task only validates context-pack execution mechanics.
Carried caps and dirty-start continuation keep verdict at PASS_WITH_WARNINGS at best.
